title: Operations Assistant Manager (Deployment & Reporting) [Tiong Bahru | 5 days | up to $3200] - LCYL
description:
Operations Assistant Manager [Deployment & Reporting]

Salary: $2,800 - $3,200

Location: Tiong Bahru / WFH

Working Days: 5 weekdays (3 weekdays & 2 weekends)

Working Hour:

Weekdays: 10.20am - 7.20pm [On-site]

Weekend: 7.00am – 5pm [WFH]

Job Responsibilities:

Teachers & CSO Deployment

  • Plan and manage relief processes across branches for Teachers & Customer Service Officers -Track Attendance of Teachers & Customer Service Officers
  • Develop communications packages for teachers (e.g. Infographics, etc)
  • Design simple collaterals in accordance with brand marketing guidelines
  • Assist with scheduling and tracking of teacher assessments, appraisal, etc

Data-tracking & Manpower Resource Management

  • Plan and manage relief processes across branches for Teachers & CSOS
  • Oversee Teacher Allocation across all branches
  • Measure adherence to leave policies and implement measures to encourage adherence Manage relief data sheets
  • Deliver monthly report on key data points tracked by team

Oversee Relief Roster

  • Find relief teachers
  • Consolidate a list of relief, freelance relief classes taken monthly and inform HR

Assist with forecasting of recruitment needs of the following groups of teachers:

  • Relief, Adjunct, Part-time and Freelance

Data-tracking for Operations

  • Manage key data sheets for Operations needs
  • Deliver monthly report on key data points tracked by team

Job Requirement:

  • At least Degree / Diploma in any discipline
  • Possess relevant experience
  • Proficiency in MS Office, Zoom, Google Drive


Cheong Yeat Long | R25145358

The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279

postedCompany.description:
THE SUPREME HR ADVISORY PTE. LTD.

Here at The Supreme HR Advisory, we pride ourselves on being a vibrant recruitment firm with strong Southeast Asia standing. We believe in customizing our services to cater to your unique needs. We are dedicated, enthusiastic and we take innovative approaches in customizing our services. Our depth of experience enables us to understand each industry’s challenges and provide expert advice on hiring requirements. Our goal is to leverage local knowledge and global expertise to deliver high-quality candidates specifically matched to the requirements of each of our clients worldwide.
